name: Mos' Nilly Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic and salt together to form a gritty paste.
2. Add the mashed avocado and mash again until well combined.
3. Pour lemon juice over the avocado mixture, stirring to ensure even distribution.
4. Stir in olive oil.
5. Add Louisiana hot sauce and stir.
6. Add Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce and stir.
7. Add wine vinegar and stir.
8. Add mustard and stir.
9. Crumble feta cheese into the dressing and mix well.
10. Add chopped tomatoes and parsley, stirring until everything is evenly incorporated.
11. Serve over lettuce or use as a dip.
Makes about 3 cups.
